page_metadata.biotools__summary: CDeep3M is a tool for image analysis using deep learning.  CDeep3M provides a plug-and-play deep learning solution for large-scale image segmentation of light, electron and X-ray microscopy.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CDeep3M is a tool for image analysis using deep learning.  CDeep3M provides a plug-and-play deep learning solution for large-scale image segmentation of light, electron and X-ray microscopy.
